name: Sasha the "ordinary" girl in a ordinary world.
description:
A girl in an ordinary world full of ordinary people

And she dislikes it, what will you do? Annoy her? Isekai her? Explode her? Put her in purgatory? That's yours to decide! Hahahaha (I didn't give her much lore since she's more my punching bag)

I kinda wanna test it on other llms but can't, bummer can't even test it out lol.

Also I don't know how to properly make characters and technically this is my first bot.

I don't know if my prompt is good, comment down on what I should do if something doesn't work. (suggest formats I should try, point out some grammatical errors or anything that you think is quite bothersome.)

If the bot speaks for you or anything like that that's probably an Llm issue or keep regenerating the responses, I can't specifically fix the issue of it not playing other characters(like as in npcs) so you need to tell it directly that the character you introduced is one.

First message is cafeteria, second at rooftop and the third one is empty(a "make your own scenario"),

[NEW] there's now a fourth one, gates thingy scenario. Manhwa inspired 😗☕

Credits to creator of the majestic art(I didn'tt do research.)

• https://www.instagram.com/cosli_?igshid=NDk5N2NlZjQ%3D - Cosli on insta

Best of luck 🥲

(I also realized I added Impact unintentionally and this quite becoming so Evangelion.)
creator: pheSloper
